name: Button
description: A tin of sewing buttons tipped onto linen — two or four thread holes, rims worn at different widths, re-sorted by every redraw.

code.style: --shell: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( /* four holes are one dot plus three shadows on a square gauge */ --hg: calc(@r(150, 200) * 1px / @Y); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(12%, 20%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--shell); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 calc(40px / @Y) rgba(40, 30, 20, 0.16); transform: rotate(@rand(-20deg, 20deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 8%; left: calc(46% - @var(--hg) / 2); top: calc(46% - @var(--hg) / 2); border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(50, 38, 26, 0.4); box-shadow: @var(--hg) 0 rgba(50, 38, 26, 0.4), 0 @var(--hg) rgba(50, 38, 26, 0.4), @var(--hg) @var(--hg) rgba(50, 38, 26, 0.4); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
